description_long: This is a pair of sporty, full-rim sunglasses with a bold, rectangular frame and slightly curved lenses. The frame is predominantly black, with thick temples that feature vibrant, stylized text and graphics in blue, red, and white, adding a dynamic and youthful flair. The lenses have a dark, mirrored tint that provides both privacy and sun protection, reflecting light with a subtle greenish hue. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, offering a seamless connection between the lenses. The temples are straight with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears, and the left temple displays a prominent brand logo and graphic design. Overall, the glasses exude a modern, urban aesthetic suitable for casual and active outdoor use.
description: Sporty, rectangular sunglasses with black full-rim frames, mirrored lenses, and bold graphic detailing on the temples.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular, full-rim black frame and dark mirrored lenses.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick temple with blue and red graphic text and a slight curve at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the inside curvature of the temples and the continuous frame structure.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the matching graphic design on the temple and the frame's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, straight temples that curve at the ends; the frame is robust and sporty, with a seamless bridge and bold styling.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark, mirrored tint with a subtle greenish reflection; lenses are opaque from the outside and provide high sun protection.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, integrated bridge with a gentle curve, forming a continuous connection between the lenses without separate nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick and straight with a pronounced curve at the tips; both temples feature large, colorful graphic text and designs in blue, red, and white, adding a distinctive and energetic look.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo and stylized text are visible on both temples, printed in blue, red, and white; the left temple displays the most prominent branding.
